## 📖 Description
Briefly describe what this PR does and why it is necessary. Explain the problem solved or the visual/functional enhancement introduced in the panel.

## 🖼️ UI/UX Visual Changes (For frontend modifications)
If this PR changes any visual aspects of the dashboard, please include **Before** and **After** screenshots or screen recordings:

| Before | After |
| :---: | :---: |
| *(Image Link/Upload)* | *(Image Link/Upload)* |

## 🛠️ Type of Change
Please check the options that are relevant:
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 Style / Cosmetic improvement (CSS, assets, responsiveness)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (no code changes)

## 🧪 Verification & Local Checks

### Build Check
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` locally and confirmed that Vite builds the bundle successfully without TypeScript or build errors.

### ESLint & Linting
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` and confirmed there are no code quality or validation errors.
- [ ] Ran `npm run format` to ensure code style consistency.

### Responsive Design
- [ ] Verified that the visual layouts are fully responsive and fit beautifully on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.

## 📝 Contributor Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the React/TypeScript style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] All developer comments inside the code are written in **English only**.
- [ ] I have not committed any hardcoded credentials, SQLite files, or keys.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce type conversions to `any`.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)
